voiceover_script: This upgrade cost nothing. It's a bottle from the recycling bin. Young seedlings die easy — one cold night or one slug is all it takes. Cut the bottom off a clear plastic bottle and push it into the soil over a seedling, cap loose for ventilation. Each plant gets its own tiny greenhouse — a few degrees warmer, safe from slugs, made from something you were about to throw away. In a cold climate, this trick keeps tender seedlings alive weeks earlier in spring — for free. This is one of the bonus sections in the full build plans — link in bio.

Cut the bottom off a clear plastic bottle and push it into the soil over a seedling, cap loose for ventilation.
Each plant gets its own tiny greenhouse — a few degrees warmer, safe from slugs, made from something you were about to throw away.
In a cold climate, this trick keeps tender seedlings alive weeks earlier in spring — for free.
This is one of the bonus sections in the full build plans — link in bio.

title_youtube: Free recycled-bottle micro-greenhouses — the £0 upgrade | Solar Smart Garden
description: A free recycled-bottle trick that keeps seedlings alive weeks earlier in spring. Full build plans and more bonus upgrades linked in bio.
